Description: The tunnel narrows ahead, its walls pulsing rhythmically like the inside of some vast living thing. Glowing fluid courses through vein-like channels in the rock, casting an eerie bioluminescent light. The air is thick and warm, carrying the faint scent of decay.

Replies.SsText: You push through the fleshy tunnel. The walls constrict around you, their bioluminescent veins flaring with each pulse. Spore-laden fluid drips onto your skin, stinging wherever it touches.

Replies.ReplyText: Climb over the rubble to find another way.
Replies.SsText: With careful footing and strong arms, you haul yourselves over the collapsed section and find a dry passage beyond. A stash of coins glints among the rubble.
Replies.FlText: The rubble shifts beneath you. Rocks tumble down, battering your party as the unstable passage collapses around your feet.

Replies.ReplyText: Search for an air pocket route. [Scout]
Replies.SsText: Your keen eyes spot a narrow crack where fresh air flows. You guide the party through a hidden passage that bypasses the worst of the spores, emerging on the other side unscathed.
